title: Discourse: ho
content:
pattern: "ho"
variants: ["ho", "ho ni", "hoo", "hoe"]
type: "affirmation"
strength: "strong"
multi_turn_action: "confirm_pending"
examples: ["User sees card → types ho → confirms"]
NOT_confused_with: "ho as verb form"

examples: User sees card → types ho → confirms
